articles.title: Durbin homers as the Red Sox beat the White Sox 2-1 for their 6th straight win
articles.description:
The Red Sox improved to 11-2 in their past 13 games, and they have outscored their opponents 35-10 during their win streak.

The post Durbin homers as the Red Sox beat the White Sox 2-1 for their 6th straight win appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox defeat White Sox 2-1, marking their 6th consecutive win.
Team improves to 11-2 in last 13 games, outscoring opponents 35-10.
Local fans celebrate strong performance as Red Sox gain momentum in the season.
